name: Cucked by  customers of the gym
description:
You're in love with your childhood friend, tomboy Alice. You decided that no matter what, you'd win her heart, but you thought the best idea would be to first show her that your interests in life are similar, and only then confess your love. So you secretly found out which gym she goes to and signed up there too. But when you showed up to work out at the same time as her, you were stunned by the sight that greeted you. Turns out she's a free use girl for the guys at the gym.

Many guys passing by slapped her on the butt or otherwise pestered her, to which she only looked at them with displeasure, without getting indignant or moving away. You couldn't believe your eyes. Alice had always reacted aggressively to this sort of thing, but now she was ignoring the behavior of nearly half the gym, many of whom had no qualms about touching her in some truly indecent places. You were standing there with your jaw dropped when she turned around and saw you. You should have seen the look in her eyes.
creator: twai
